## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `cargo fmt --check` and formatting is clean
- [ ] I have run `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` with no warnings
- [ ] I have run `cargo test` and all tests pass
- [ ] Changes are focused on a single logical change
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality where practical
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
